zh.lifeSummary: 當Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond於1065年1月29日出生在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯時，他的父親Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne66歲，母親Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille38歲。他於1084年之前與Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp在法國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1136年4月21日在英國英格蘭越可爾里士滿享年71歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫貝加德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond于1065年1月29日出生在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯时，他的父亲Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne66岁，母亲Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille38岁。他于1084年之前与Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp在法国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1136年4月21日在英国英格兰越可爾里士滿享年71岁，埋葬在法国布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫貝加德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Etienne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stephen
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

en.lifeSummary: When Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond was born on 29 January 1065, in Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne, was 66 and his mother, Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille, was 38. He married Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp before 1084, in France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 21 April 1136, in Richmond, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Bégard, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond est né le 29 janvier 1065, à Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne, avait 66 ans et sa mère, Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp avant 1084, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 21 avril 1136, à Richmond, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Bégard, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond am 29. Januar 1065 in Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne 66 und seine Mutter Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille 38. Er hat vor 1084 in Frankreich Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 21. April 1136 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Richmond, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bégard, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond è nato il il 29 gennaio 1065 nel Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne, aveva 66 anni e il suo madre, Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp prima del 1084, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 21 aprile 1136, nel Richmond, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Bégard, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmondが1065年1月29日にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスで生まれた時，父Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagneは66歳，母Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouailleは38歳であった。1084年以前にフランスでHawise Guincamp Countess of Guingampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1136年4月21日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアリチモンドで71歳で死去し，フランスブレタグンクoテス-ド'アルモーブeガードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond(이)가 1065년 1월 29일 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne(은)는 66세였고, 그의 어머니 Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1084년 이전 프랑스에서 Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1136년 4월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리ch몽에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드'아모르 브e가드에 묻혔다.

pt.29 January 1065–21 April 1136: 29 de janeiro de 1065–21 de abril de 1136
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond nasceu em 29 de janeiro de 1065, em Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne, tinha 66 anos e sua mãe, Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp antes 1084, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de abril de 1136, em Richmond, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Bégard, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond родился 29 января 1065 г. в местности арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne было 66 лет, а матери, которую звали Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp перед 1084 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 21 апреля 1136 г. в местности ричмонд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности бeгард, кoтес-д'армор, бретагн, Франция.

es.29 January 1065–21 April 1136: 29 de enero de 1065–21 de abril de 1136
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond nació el 29 de enero de 1065, en Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne, tenía 66 años y su mamá, Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp antes de 1084, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 21 de abril de 1136, en Richmond, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Bégard, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia.
